page_metadata.biotools__summary: StrainXpress is a de novo assembly method which base on overlap-layout-consensus (OLC) paradigm and can fast and accurately assemble high complexity metagenome sequencing data at strain resolution.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: StrainXpress is a de novo assembly method which base on overlap-layout-consensus (OLC) paradigm and can fast and accurately assemble high complexity metagenome sequencing data at strain resolution.
